Variables.Name: StartBone
Variables.Description: Name of root bone from which the spline extends

Variables.Name: EndBone
Variables.Description: Name of bone at the end of the spline chain. Bones after this will not be altered by the controller.

Variables.Name: BoneAxis
Variables.Description: Axis of the controlled bone (ie the direction of the spline) to use as the direction for the curve.

Variables.Name: bAutoCalculateSpline
Variables.Description: The number of points in the spline if we are specifying it directly

Variables.Name: PointCount
Variables.Description: The number of points in the spline if we are not auto-calculating

Variables.Name: Roll
Variables.Description: Overall roll of the spline, applied on top of other rotations along the direction of the spline

Variables.Name: TwistStart
Variables.Description: The twist of the start bone. Twist is interpolated along the spline according to Twist Blend.

Variables.Name: TwistEnd
Variables.Description: The twist of the end bone. Twist is interpolated along the spline according to Twist Blend.

Variables.Name: TwistBlend
Variables.Description: How to interpolate twist along the length of the spline

Variables.Name: Stretch
Variables.Description:
The maximum stretch allowed when fitting bones to the spline. 0.0 means bones do not stretch their length,
	  1.0 means bones stretch to the length of the spline

Variables.Name: Offset
Variables.Description: The distance along the spline from the start from which bones are constrained

Variables.Name: OriginalSplineLength
Variables.Description: Cached spline length from when the spline was originally applied to the skeleton

Variables.Name: CachedBoneReferences
Variables.Description: Cached data for bones in the IK chain, from start to end

Variables.Name: CachedBoneLengths
Variables.Description: Cached bone lengths. Same size as CachedBoneReferences

Variables.Name: CachedOffsetRotations
Variables.Description: Cached bone offset rotations. Same size as CachedBoneReferences
